findings.title: APP_DEBUG is enabled
findings.description: APP_DEBUG is set to true. In production, this exposes detailed error messages including stack traces, database queries, and environment variables to end users.
findings.remediation: Set APP_DEBUG=false in your production .env file. Use Laravel's logging system for error tracking instead.

findings.title: APP_ENV is set to 'local'
findings.description: The application environment suggests a non-production configuration. If this is a production server, this may cause debug features to be enabled and performance optimizations to be skipped.
findings.remediation: Set APP_ENV=production on production servers.

findings.title: Database password is empty
findings.description: DB_PASSWORD is set to an empty string. While this may be valid for local development with trust authentication, it's a security risk if this configuration reaches production.
findings.remediation: Set a strong database password for non-local environments.

findings.title: [CVE-2026-35453] phpoffice/phpspreadsheet@1.30.0 — PhpSpreadsheet has XSS via NumberFormat @ Text Substitution in HTML Writer
findings.description: PhpSpreadsheet has XSS via NumberFormat @ Text Substitution in HTML Writer
findings.remediation:
Upgrade phpoffice/phpspreadsheet to 5.7.0 or later:
  composer require phpoffice/phpspreadsheet:5.7.0
